outcome_categories.EXITED_OTHER: IPO, merger, or other formal exit
outcome_categories.PIVOTED: Same legal entity (or rebranded entity) now doing something different
outcome_categories.DORMANT: Website still up but no apparent activity for 12+ months

outcomes.summary: Co-founder Fred Tzeng has moved on to other companies. The SBIR-stage company has no active web presence as a chip-design startup. A separate 'Zerowatt Energy' (India-based industrial-energy AI) is unrelated.
Received 510(k) FDA clearance in March 2021 for the BBX-PET portable PET scanner. Founders and private investors have put in over $8M total; focused on Alzheimer's neurology applications.
Acquired by Medtronic on April 14, 2020 for undisclosed terms. Received FlowMet-R 510(k) FDA clearance in 2019. Founder/CEO Sean White now leads Medtronic's diagnostics & monitoring group.
Rebranded as 'Middle School Moguls' in 2016, hit Target shelves fall 2016, adapted into a 4-episode CG miniseries with Nickelodeon in 2019. No evidence of activity past 2021.

The 2016 UCI design site exists, plus a 2019 Rice Business Plan Competition appearance under 'Embryologic'. No Crunchbase or current company site. Underlying FLIM-phasor IVF research published in Scientific Reports (2019).

Founder Leila Safavi runs puristinc.com. Oak Ridge National Lab Innovation Crossroads Cohort 3 fellow; received $223K NIH SBIR in 2019. Still small/seed stage with no announced funding round beyond grants.
Original UCI source describes APIC as a non-invasive point-of-care malaria test (the archive's 'saliva diagnostic' label may be inaccurate). No web presence post-2017.
Crunchbase profile exists; the platforms proboknow.com and lowboknow.com show parking pages or expired domains. Founder Chad Trainer's nonprofit raised about $100K but no public activity post-2018.
UCI senior design / research project rather than an incorporated startup. Open-source code on GitHub but no company entity traceable. A separate Houston-based 'BrainCheck Inc.' is unrelated.

Rebranded as BRIUS Technologies (Carrollton, TX). Launched the Brava hidden-braces system commercially in 2022. Total funding ~$46M per PitchBook, including a May 2025 round of ~$19.45M led by View Ventures.
Founder Keene Do's juice startup has no traceable commercial presence post-2018. Not to be confused with Apeel Sciences (Santa Barbara coatings company), which is unrelated.

closedloopplastics.com now serves a Sedo parking page. LinkedIn page exists but most recent press coverage is from 2021. Moved from UCI to Long Beach for a brief expansion phase but appears wound down.
A UCI undergrad team's online marketplace for underground artists 18-24. No Crunchbase, no surviving site, no LinkedIn company page traceable.
Evolved into NeuroQure (launched 2023), which acquired the underlying patent portfolio from UCI in 2024. Its CLIA-certified ASD Insight test is marketed as the first biological test for autism.
Transparent charitable vehicle-donation platform; site live at cardana.co with active KBB-based donation flow, partner/charity onboarding, and a 20% flat-fee model.
Rebranded as Wing Assistant. Raised a $2.1M seed in 2021. Continues as a subscription managed-virtual-assistant service in 2025-2026 with newer tooling (Pie by Wing).

Now branded eLysis Inc. Raised $400K+ in non-dilutive funding, completed pig animal study, working toward FDA 510(k). Co-founders: Joon You, Michael Hill PhD, Dr. Steve Yoelin (Latisse developer). Pre-clinical-trial / pre-revenue.

Effective January 1, 2023, the company discontinued membership plans, verification, PVSA certification, and its app, pivoting to 'student experiential learning and workforce development.' volunteercrowd.com returns HTTP 404 as of research time.
Product listings still appear on Amazon/Etsy but no recent company-side activity.
Magnetic stethoscope holder still selling at stethngo.com with an active product line and bulk pricing for healthcare facilities.

outcomes.confidence: confirmed; strongest non-medical outcome in the archive
outcomes.summary: Raised $1.2M oversubscribed seed in 2023 (XRC Ventures, Sunstone Management, Salt Lake City Angels, Crescent Fund). Reportedly 7-figure 2025 revenue. Launched 123 Book Box product line for toddlers. TechCrunch coverage (2023). 2-10 employees.
CEO Aryan Ghanadan's PETE-plastic housing concept has no traceable post-2020 company site or funding announcements.

Now ImmunoTarget Therapeutics, Inc. Stephanie Hachey, PhD is founder/CEO/CSO. Tracxn lists company as unfunded as of 2025. UCI conflict-of-interest disclosure on a March 2025 bioRxiv preprint confirms still active and licensing UCI tech.
Beyond the 2020 NVC win and an F6S profile, no surviving e-commerce site, social presence, or news after 2020-2021.
Subscription absorbed into Moongoat Coffee Roasters' subscription program in December 2022 (asset/subscriber transfer rather than equity transaction).
outcomes.acquisition_terms: asset/subscriber transfer, not equity; terms undisclosed

outcomes.summary: Now Shaka Culture Inc., HQ in Kansas City, MO. Raised approximately $120K (Techstars, InnoVenture Iowa, ISA Ventures, UCI Merage). Microsoft Teams integration certified. PitchBook profile current as of 2025.
CEO Caleb Finn was raising $400K to build a fall 2022 pilot facility. No subsequent press, funding, or website. Likely never reached operational scale.
StyloSonic, LLC has a PitchBook profile. UCI/UCSD alumni team. 2022 peer-reviewed paper in Photoacoustics demonstrating in-vivo periodontal imaging. Continues in Wayfinder accelerator.
Site remsys.app is reachable and lists AI resume features, but no marketing or blog activity past 2021 surfaces.

Founder Michael Allotey (former Amazon engineer). Funded; Arch Grants recipient (St. Louis-based after relocating). Tracxn shows still active as of early 2026 but ranked 750th of 1,851 dating apps; LinkedIn page minimal recent activity.
Sustainable paper from elephant-feces fibers. No findable company site, Crunchbase, or post-2022 traction.
Continuous IOP (intraocular pressure) monitoring system. No Crunchbase, no surviving site, no follow-on funding traceable.

Site bafoodtech.com is live with insect-protein product page. Co-founders Hamoon Shishechian and Parham Mansor Safain (brothers-in-law) operating a black soldier fly farm. No announced funding round; appears pre-revenue / early.
Clinical-stage adipose-tissue regenerative-medicine company. Raised ~$1.16M; joined California Life Sciences FAST Spring 2024 cohort; published 2025-trend commentary as recently as Q1 2025.
Founder Catlin Tran's dietary-restriction restaurant-matching app received a $25K Verizon grant in 2025 and was profiled by UCI Social Sciences in March 2025.
mysnaphealth.com remains up describing patient data stewardship, but no funding or product news surfaces.

Team leader Fiza Qureshi's LinkedIn shows she is now a Product Analyst at Reynolds and Reynolds, not building VagAligna full-time. Project requires clinical trials and FDA approval; no announced incorporated entity, funding, or follow-on activity.

leprendo.com live with 2026 copyright, active product catalog (specialty produce, dried fruits, oils). Co-founders Dylan Riffle and Dan Ta. Reported $400K first-year sales. Pivoted from short-form-video food marketplace framing to a more conventional online farmer's market.

hyperioneye.com active. Newport Beach, CA. Founders Krzysztof Palczewski and Jennings Luu (UCI Center for Translational Vision Research). Seed-stage biopharmaceutical; pipeline of SP3, SP4, SP5 small-molecule SREDs in late preclinical.
A 2023 NVC finalist with no incorporated company, no traceable site, and no follow-on funding.
Modular multi-pet leash system on sale at omnipetclub.com with active social channels (Instagram, Threads) and retail distribution via Chewy, Walmart, and Amazon.
UCI/Orange Coast College student team continues iterating on modular ADUs. Their LuminOCity unit was donated to Homeless Intervention Services-OC and opened to house at-risk youth in July 2025.

Driver-monitoring AI dashcam now appears as part of Spotter.ai's 'Sentinel' platform: same name, same trucking-safety vertical, expanded scope. Team appears to have folded into Spotter.ai (soft acqui-hire) but no explicit acquisition press release was located.
neomold.uci.design site is up. No incorporation, funding, or FDA filing yet. Design-stage academic project. Separate established competitor TalexMedical (InfantEar) operates in the same space.
Confirmed only as a 2024 NVC winner; no website, Crunchbase, or follow-on traceable.
Surfboard-rental marketplace thequiver.com active across 20+ countries with a paid membership tier and a live app/marketplace as of 2025-2026.
Surfaces only as an early-stage signup form; no operating storefront found.
DermaVision Technologies' multispectral bruise-imaging tool placed third at the 2024 BMES Medtronic Design Competition. UC has listed the underlying intellectual property as available for licensing.
Won the 2025 Grand Prize in June 2025. Team led by Yifan 'May' Mei. Too recent for outcome data.
Bluetooth/UV-C smart retainer case, 2025 Runner-Up. Too recent for outcome data.
UCI senior bioengineering design project. nasocoustics.uci.design is up; LinkedIn presence. Pre-incorporation; design-review stage. Too recent for outcome data.
Founder Ricianne 'Chi' Rey was hired in October 2025 as the UCI ANTrepreneur Center Program Lead and continues to be described as a PCOS-platform co-founder.
Confirmed as a 2025 Stella Zhang finalist; no independent product traction yet.
Passive thermal-imaging vitals monitor for seniors; confirmed as a 2025 Stella Zhang finalist. No independent funding or launch news.

notable_pivots.note: Now CLIA-certified ASD Insight autism test
